entries.label: Pay a project
entries.hint: Send tokens to a project and receive project tokens in return

entries.label: Cash out tokens
entries.hint: Burn project tokens to reclaim a share of the project's surplus

entries.label: Launch a project
entries.hint: Launch a project with omnichain support, NFT tiers, and suckers

entries.label: Queue rulesets
entries.hint: Queue new rulesets for a project to take effect after the current one ends

entries.label: Send payouts
entries.hint: Distribute funds to a project's payout split recipients

entries.label: Distribute reserved tokens
entries.hint: Mint and distribute pending reserved tokens to split recipients

entries.label: Use surplus allowance
entries.hint: Withdraw funds from a project's surplus up to the ruleset's allowance

entries.label: Add to balance
entries.hint: Add funds to a project's balance without minting tokens

entries.label: Launch rulesets (omnichain)
entries.hint: Launch rulesets with omnichain sucker deployment

entries.label: Deploy suckers
entries.hint: Deploy cross-chain sucker contracts for a project

entries.label: Launch project (basic)
entries.hint: Launch a project without omnichain support

entries.label: Launch rulesets (basic)
entries.hint: Launch initial rulesets for an existing project without omnichain

entries.label: Mint tokens
entries.hint: Mint new project tokens to a beneficiary

entries.label: Burn tokens
entries.hint: Burn a holder's project tokens, permanently removing them from supply

entries.label: Deploy ERC-20 for project
entries.hint: Deploy a claimable ERC-20 token with governance and gasless approvals

entries.label: Claim ERC-20 tokens
entries.hint: Convert internal credits into the project's ERC-20 token

entries.label: Transfer credits
entries.hint: Transfer internal credits (unclaimed tokens) to another address

entries.label: Set split groups
entries.hint: Configure how a project distributes payouts and reserved tokens

entries.label: Set operator permissions
entries.hint: Grant or revoke permissions for an operator on a project

entries.label: Set project metadata URI
entries.hint: Set a project's metadata URI (typically an IPFS hash)

entries.label: Add price feed
entries.hint: Register a price feed for a new currency pair

entries.label: Migrate terminal balance
entries.hint: Migrate a project's funds to a new terminal

entries.label: Process held fees
entries.hint: Send held fees to the protocol's fee project after the 28-day hold

entries.label: Set terminals
entries.hint: Replace a project's entire terminal list

entries.label: Set primary terminal
entries.hint: Designate the default terminal for a token

entries.label: Set controller
entries.hint: Set a project's controller contract

entries.label: Add accounting contexts
entries.hint: Register new token accounting contexts for a terminal

entries.label: Set project operator
entries.hint: Approve an operator for all your project NFTs

entries.label: Set feeless address
entries.hint: Mark an address as exempt from protocol fees

entries.label: Preview payment
entries.hint: Preview how many project tokens a payer would receive

entries.label: Preview cash out
entries.hint: Preview how many tokens a holder would reclaim

entries.label: Reclaimable surplus
entries.hint: How much a token holder could reclaim from surplus right now

entries.label: Current ruleset
entries.hint: Returns the ruleset currently governing a project

entries.label: Upcoming ruleset
entries.hint: The ruleset that will take effect after the current one ends

entries.label: Total token supply (incl. reserved)
entries.hint: Total supply including tokens reserved but not yet minted

entries.label: Terminal balance
entries.hint: A project's balance of a specific token within a terminal

entries.label: Current surplus
entries.hint: A project's surplus in this terminal, converted to a given currency

entries.label: Pending reserved tokens
entries.hint: Reserved tokens that have accumulated but not yet been distributed

entries.label: Latest queued ruleset
entries.hint: The most recently queued ruleset, whether active or not

entries.label: Held fees
entries.hint: Fees held for a project during the 28-day hold period

entries.label: Holder total balance
entries.hint: A holder's credits plus ERC-20 balance for a project

entries.label: Credit balance
entries.hint: A holder's internal credit balance (unclaimed tokens)

entries.label: Total token supply
entries.hint: Credits plus ERC-20 total supply for a project

entries.label: Primary terminal
entries.hint: The terminal that receives payments in a given token for a project

entries.label: Project controller
entries.hint: The controller assigned to a project

entries.label: Project terminals
entries.hint: All terminals registered for a project

entries.label: Split recipients
entries.hint: The list of split recipients for a project's group

entries.label: Check permission
entries.hint: Whether an operator has a specific permission for a project

entries.label: Ruleset history
entries.hint: Paginated history of a project's rulesets, newest first

entries.label: Payout limits
entries.hint: All payout limits for a project's terminal and token

entries.label: Surplus allowances
entries.hint: All surplus allowances for a project's terminal and token

entries.label: Used payout limit
entries.hint: How much of the payout limit has been used this cycle

entries.label: Price per unit
entries.hint: Exchange rate between two currencies

entries.label: Project ERC-20 token
entries.hint: The ERC-20 token address deployed for a project

entries.label: Project owner
entries.hint: The address that owns a project's NFT

entries.label: Check multiple permissions
entries.hint: Whether an operator has all of the specified permissions

entries.label: Is feeless address
entries.hint: Check whether an address is exempt from protocol fees (project-scoped)

entries.label: Used surplus allowance
entries.hint: How much surplus allowance has been used this cycle

entries.label: Total projects
entries.hint: The total number of projects that have been created
